name: Orchestrator Migration Planner - Backstory Starter
description: Creates a migration blueprint between orchestration platforms while preserving workflow order, state handling, payload contracts, and the selected customer adapter-pack plan.

nodes.name: Migration Intake Webhook
nodes.notes: Receive the workflow family, source orchestrator, target orchestrator, and migration constraints.

nodes.name: Workflow Parameters
nodes.notes: Keep strategy defaults and migration registry references outside the workflow so cutover rules can evolve independently.

nodes.name: Normalize Migration Request
nodes.notes: Flatten the intake into a canonical migration object before mapping step equivalents and cutover behavior.

nodes.name: Design Migration Plan

options.systemMessage: You are an orchestration migration assistant that preserves workflow behavior while honoring customer config and adapter-pack decisions.

nodes.notes: Use this step to map step equivalents and explain behavior differences that matter during cutover.

nodes.name: Deliver Migration Blueprint

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { workflowFamily: $json.workflowFamily, sourceOrchestrator: $json.sourceOrchestrator, targetOrchestrator: $json.targetOrchestrator, customerConfigRef: $json.customerConfigRef, selectedPackIds: $json.selectedPackIds || [], plan: $json.output || $json.text || "Migration plan required" } }}

nodes.notes: Replace this with Slack, Teams, Jira, Linear, or another implementation planning surface.
